headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日热搜，《福尔摩斯小姐3》蓄势待发
headlineEn: 'Obsession' Tops Today's Trends, 'Enola Holmes 3' on the Horizon
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：无新片上映，但《痴迷》热度最高，《福尔摩斯小姐3》和《无职转生》紧随其后。本周《达顿牧场》等剧集备受关注，多部大片即将来袭。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but 'Obsession' leads trending, followed by 'Enola Holmes 3' and 'Mushoku Tensei'. This week's highlights include 'Dutton Ranch' and upcoming blockbusters.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 本周《达顿牧场》热度飙升，衍生剧或已提上日程。
industryHighlights.en: 'Dutton Ranch' surges this week, spinoff series reportedly in development.

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》进入本周热搜，续集细节引猜测。
industryHighlights.en: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' trends this week, sequel details spark speculation.

industryHighlights.text: 《超级少女》新动态：选角传闻再起，粉丝期待重启。
industryHighlights.en: New 'Supergirl' buzz: casting rumors resurface, fans anticipate reboot.

industryHighlights.text: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》定档在即，漫威宇宙新篇章将启。
industryHighlights.en: 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' imminent release date, new MCU chapter ahead.
